meta.name: Powerplay Obsidian Emerald DNA
meta.description: A synthesized premium design profile combining the editorial typography of Locomotive.ca with the glassmorphic, bento-grid tech HUD aesthetic of Webisoft.com, tailored specifically for high-end sports and cricket analytics.

primary.role: Main background base, delivering deep, immersive dark canvas depth.

secondary.role: Forest emerald green, acting as structural headers and category borders.

accent.role: Electric mint-emerald neon, highlighting active elements, live score tick numbers, and CTAs.

neutral.usage: Light cream ivory (#F4EFE6) for high-contrast primary text, slate greys for muted parameters and labels, and deep obsidian variants for surfaces and cards.

color.contrast_strategy: dark-on-light dominant for small labels, high contrast white-ivory text on dark obsidian-emerald layers for main content blocks to ensure WCAG 2.1 AAA compliance.

typography.font_style_notes: Heavy display headers with extreme negative tracking (-0.03em) and compressed line heights, contrasted with highly readable sans-serif body copy and Suisse monospaced technical metric digits.

spacing.section_rhythm: Generous vertical clamps ranging from 64px on mobile up to 120px on desktops to isolate complex data containers and provide visual breathing room.

shape.border_usage: subtle 1px border overlays styled as linear light gradients with low opacity (4%)

elevation.depth_cues: blur/glass backdrops, overlapping absolute grids, and soft drop shadows to create a layered tech stack feel

motion.entrance_pattern: y-axis offset (staggered translateY slide-up) with custom spring curves
motion.exit_pattern: opacity fade out with micro-scale down
motion.philosophy: cinematic and fluid motion that serves to explain transitions and establish page state without interrupting fast data scans

components.button_style: translucent border frames with neon mint scaling outlines on hover, or flat dark solid blocks with spring-staggered typography
components.input_style: minimalist dark fields with 1px border lines, focus glows, and monospaced placeholder cues
components.card_style: glassmorphic bento panels utilizing 16px frosted backdrops, subtle 1px border highlights, and 20px custom corner cuts
components.navigation_pattern: floating glassmorphic bottom bar nested in safe-area-inset with centered, responsive column-based navigation links
components.modal_style: translucent screen takeovers with staggered pixel grid fade-ins and scale-reveal containers
components.list_style: border-separated rows with monospaced counters, subtle hover light states, and right-aligned action tags
components.component_notes: All interactive triggers and buttons have tactile, physical-click animations to reinforce standard app behaviors.

aesthetic.visual_metaphor: A glowing, high-performance athletic dashboard overlaying a deep nocturnal stadium background.
aesthetic.era_influence: 2026 High-Contrast Neo-Brutalism and Glassmorphic SaaS design.
aesthetic.genre: luxury software dashboard / premium sports analytics

visual_language.visual_weight_distribution: asymmetric with heavy display focal points
visual_language.focal_strategy: single giant display metrics surrounded by dense statistical grids
visual_language.texture_usage: matte paper grain layered on top of digital gradients to provide organic texture

composition.hierarchy_method: typographic scale contrast and neon color accents
composition.flow_direction: horizontal scroll timelines and vertical bento grids
composition.grouping_strategy: modular bento box containers with crisp, sub-pixel borders
composition.negative_space_role: creates spatial breathing room and isolates vital score segments

imagery.photo_treatment: monochromatic or desaturated overlays with high-contrast emerald/cyan tint grids
imagery.illustration_style: abstract vector layout wireframes and glowing wire overlays
imagery.graphic_elements: radial glowing spotlights, monospaced borders, and sub-pixel lines
imagery.pattern_usage: dynamic dot grids and micro-grid patterns
imagery.image_shape: sharp-cornered with optional polygonal cut details

interaction_feel.feedback_style: tactile and reactive, giving physical feedback on clicks and hovers
interaction_feel.hover_behavior: glowing border transitions and subtle translate-up elevations
interaction_feel.transition_personality: smooth slide-glide and staggered pixel animations
interaction_feel.loading_style: rolling slot number tickers and pixel-grid preloaders

brand_voice_in_ui.cta_style: direct imperative with animated arrow indicators
brand_voice_in_ui.empty_state_approach: clean monospaced layout with minimal vectors

overview.fallback_strategy: fall back to pure CSS background colors and static layout grids on low-power devices
overview.primary_technology: Next.js, Tailwind, Framer Motion, and custom Canvas filters

background_effects.description: Subtle, slow-pulsing radial gradients simulating soft neon stadium spotlights reflecting off an organic dark obsidian pitch.

particle_systems.description: Not active in this profile to preserve focus on heavy data visuals.

3d_elements.description: Represented as styled 2D vectors and CSS layouts rather than heavy active WebGL scenes to ensure ultra-lightweight mobile load times.

shader_effects.description: Bypassed on main routes, simulating glowing visual aberrations using CSS filter backdrops instead.

text_effects.description: Headlines roll and reveal character-by-character on page transition exits and entries, creating a highly cinematic mechanical load effect.

cursor_effects.description: Standard pointer default preserved to allow precise mouse selections on high-density stats tables.

image_effects.description: Grid items tilt and shift their focal depths based on cursor coordinates, creating sub-pixel physical volume inside the bento frame.

canvas_drawings.description: Charts and scatter indicators are rendered using optimized SVG vectors and Tailwind rather than Canvas to ensure clean font scaling.

svg_animations.description: The Wagon Wheel interactive field draws and connects bowling vector trajectories using glowing animated SVG paths when hovered.

visual_effects.composite_notes: The visual hierarchy is designed so that the neon mint active highlights and glowing probability dials pierce through the desaturated, translucent obsidian glass layers, creating a high-performance, clinical sports HUD feel.
